title: Orbital strike cannon Plugin
description: Hi i made a plugin for an orbital strike cannon. Inspired by cubicmetre i made a minecraft plugin to destory any spot on the world. edit config yml to your username to use the command
body:
⚠️WARNING⚠️ THIS WILL CRASH YOUR CLIENT WITH ENOUGH TNT AND ENOUGH RINGS YOU MIGHT CRASH I AM NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR ANY PC DAMAGE OR DESTRUCTION LAG OR PROCEED WITH CAUTION.


Hi i made a plugin for an orbital strike cannon. Inspired by cubicmetre i made a minecraft plugin to destory any spot on the world. edit config yml to your username to use the command


Heres how to use your new command espically for /fire and i fixed it!

/fire ~ 500 ~ nuke 80 5 on -50 10 150
/fire: is the same thing

~ 500 ~: Cords ~ means at your location

nuke: Payload. Can use stab shot

80: Fuse in ticks: 20 ticks = 1 second(s)

5: Spacing from each ring of tnt

on: use motion

-50: Motion y. - for down + for up

10: for rings of tnt

150: tnt per ring

you can customize this in any way shape or form!
